title: German AI startup Parloa triples valuation to $3 billion in latest fundraise | Reuters
full_text: German AI startup Parloa triples valuation to $3 billion in latest fundraise | Reuters Jan 15 (Reuters) - German startup Parloa has raised $350 million in a late-stage round that tripled the valuation of the artificial intelligence-driven customer service platform to $3 billion in less than a year.
